details.test: Task 1: Register cheapest 12U weekday evening Spring 2026 session
Task 2: Save upcoming 14U Thunder games to My Schedule
Task 3: Sign up for two June evening concession shifts at Field 2
Task 4: Buy youth tee, adult hat, and water bottle with constraints
Task 5: Register July pitching clinic with most hours under $120
Task 6: Reserve Wednesday evening 12U practice field with lights
Task 7: Find beginner 10U team within 10 miles practicing Tue/Thu and save to My Teams
Task 8: Save 12U bat rules and Code of Conduct to My Resources
